designSystem.fontFamily: -apple-system, SF Pro Display, SF Pro Text, Helvetica Neue, sans-serif
designSystem.style: AI Personalization Landing — Soft 3D, chunky, playful, toy-like, bubbly elements with thick borders (3px), double shadows, and rounded corners (16-24px). Dark mode default with light mode toggle.

features.themeToggle: Dark/Light mode with full theme system
features.animations: fadeIn, slideUp, pulse, shimmer, slideRight, bounceIn, float, glow
features.navigation: Bottom tab bar with elevated center Create button
features.interactivity: Like/favorite toggles, search filtering, category filters, remix tool selection, toast notifications
